Mode 1 (Section Expansion — rework) @ 2026-04-27T02:12:33.544Z.

WORK PERFORMED:
  Wrote monitor/analyst/expansions/EXP-264-overview-evaluate-preface-mechanical.json (27,396 bytes; 2 patch segments; insert_before / insert_after on build-scripts/generate-html.js).

  Both files JSON-validated post-write. Used .tmp-build-exp264.js + .tmp-update-tracker.js JSON.stringify pattern (per analyst.md mandate); first-try valid.

EXP-264 CONTENT SUMMARY (5 mechanical/typographic fixes; substance unchanged from EXP-257):
  CRITICAL re-anchor: segment EP2 anchor moved from '.verdict-bars .vb-caption{font-size:.9rem;color:var(--text);opacity:.75;margin:0 0 .8rem}' (curmudgeon c1 grep_count=0 in current main) to '.ds-verdict-bars .ds-vb-caption{font-size:.9rem;color:var(--text);opacity:.75;margin:0 0 .8rem}' (verified grep_count=1 on workspace AND raw GitHub main, file 149,980 bytes identical).
  MODERATE prefix migration: all 9 new CSS classes renamed in both segment EP1 (HTML class= attributes) and segment EP2 (CSS selectors, including compound selectors): evaluate-preface -> ds-evaluate-preface; ep-{heading,caption,jump,rows,row,num,q,where} -> ds-ep-{heading,caption,jump,rows,row,num,q,where}. 13 distinct CSS rules updated. Honors ISS-1573 invariant (closed precedent EXP-255 c1 fixed).
  MODERATE WCAG fix: color:var(--ink-3) -> color:var(--ink-2) on .ds-ep-heading, .ds-ep-num, .ds-ep-where text declarations. Curmudgeon c1 measurement reproduces independently: dark-mode --ink-3 #8a8680 on --card-bg #222240 = 4.23:1 (FAILS AA 4.5:1); --ink-2 #b8b5ad = 7.48:1 (PASSES with margin). Light mode 5.36 -> 7.69, both pass. Border-left:3px var(--ink-3) intentionally retained — non-textual UI element governed by WCAG 1.4.11 (3:1 threshold), met in both modes.
  MINOR typography: Q2 apostrophe 'model’s' -> 'model\'s' (ASCII) to match eg-evaluate body copy at docs/index.html:481/502 verbatim.
  MINOR caption: 'Full preface ->' -> 'Read the long form ->' to set correct expectation that destination is a collapsed <details id="eg-evaluate"> block (readers may need to click <summary> to expand).

DRY-RUN VERIFICATION (in-memory apply on workspace build-scripts/generate-html.js):
  EP1 anchor occurrences: 1 (pass). EP2 anchor occurrences: 1 (pass).
  byte delta: +3,952 (matches expected ~+30 lines + spacing).
  .ds-evaluate-preface occurrences: 18 (1 HTML + 17 CSS); class="ds-evaluate-preface" in HTML: 1 (pass).
  Unprefixed leak count: 0 (pass).
  ink-2 swap declarations: 3 (pass).

  All 5 questions present verbatim.
  DRY RUN PASSED.

prev_analyst_run.note:
Mode 2 (Human Notes) @ 2026-04-27T01:11:25.968Z. DISPATCHER TRACE (against fresh clone refreshed at PRELUDE from origin/main): Mode 0 — WIN onboarding: workspace=71, GitHub=71. NO WORK. Mode 1 — Expansion queue: NO ACTIONABLE EXPANSIONS. Mode 1b — Prediction writeups: ALL DONE. Mode 2 — Human notes: 1 pending (HNOTE-OPERATOR-WIN-001-TESLA-PREDICTION-VS-MEASUREMENT-001). FIRED. (Modes 2b/3/4 not evaluated this run; Mode 2 has priority and produces work.) Assigned-analyst issues: 1 (ISS-1578, minor). DEFERRED to next run. WORK PERFORMED: Wrote monitor/analyst/expansions/EXP-263-WIN001-tesla-prediction-vs-measurement.json (21,835 bytes; 2 patches; targeted_substring_replacement on data/wins.json WIN-001 detail_evidence + tldr_evidence). Updated monitor/analyst/expansion-tracker.json: added EXP-263 entry, status=complete, output_file linked. Marked monitor/analyst/human-notes.json (FUSE + clone, dual-write per CLAUDE.md "Human Notes Rule") HNOTE-OPERATOR-WIN-001-TESLA-PREDICTION-VS-MEASUREMENT-001 status=consumed; consumed_by points at EXP-263. All files JSON-validated post-write. EXP-263 CONTENT SUMMARY: Resolves operator's concern that current WIN-001 writeup conflates Tesla's apparatus-coherence parameter (1/0.08484s ≈ 11.78 Hz, US Patent 787,412) with a measurement of Earth's resonance — the dome's wins.html literally writes "Predicted 11.787 Hz — Observed 11.787 Hz. Exact match." as if both halves were independent. Three new sub-headed paragraphs inserted into detail_evidence (before "

The dome's formula exposes the relabeling." anchor, count=1, verified unique): 1. "Prediction or measurement?" — names the conflation, quotes the patent verbatim, attributes first Schumann observation to Balser & Wagner 1960 (1960s instrumentation, decades after Tesla's 1943 death), notes none of 7.83/14.3/20.8/27.3/33.8 Hz is 11.78 Hz. 2. "Tesla's actual Earth-resonance prediction was different" — lists Tesla's separately-published ~6, 18, 30 Hz speculation (Colorado Springs Notes 1899-1900), shows it misses the measured Schumann band by both fundamental and harmonic spacing, identifies which Tesla number the dome is citing as the apparatus-coherence one not the resonance prediction. 3. "Where the kernel sits: velocity correction" — substitutes vacuum c for Tesla's 471,240 km/s in his own round-trip-around-Earth formula → ≈7.48 Hz, within 5% of measured Schumann 7.83 Hz; cross-links WIN-062. Math verified: 40,075 km / c = 0.13368 s → 7.481 Hz; π/2 vs Tesla 1.572 ratio match within 0.07%. tldr_evidence rewritten (3 sentences): leads with apparatus-vs-measurement, names 1960s-first-measured 7.83 Hz fundamental, mentions Tesla's separately-predicted 6/18/30 Hz miss, preserves the version-history-admitted-circular punchline. Drops the obsolete "globe measurement" phrasing that contained the same conflation we are fixing. Detail_evidence length: 6,890 → 10,631 chars (+3,741, ~3 paragraphs additive). Verdict (Refuted by Data) and other detail fields untouched. WIN-002, WIN-029, WIN-062 untouched. USER-PREFERENCE DIRECTIVE ("Think about the other side too"): Strongest defender pushback is "Tesla wrote the 11.78 Hz number; he was approximately right; therefore the credit isn't fake." Acknowledged in EXP-263.other_side_of_the_argument: defense fails on (1) Tesla's number as written is not the Schumann fundamental — neither Tesla nor any later instrument measured 11.78 Hz, and the 7.83 Hz fundamental was found in 1960; (2) Tesla's actual Earth-resonance estimates (~6, 18, 30 Hz) miss the measured band; (3) the dome's "Predicted = Observed" framing presents a single quoted number as an empirical match. Credit-where-due is genuine but tightly scoped: Tesla had the right order of magnitude on a spherical-Earth round-trip framework when his superluminal velocity is corrected. The kernel-of-truth paragraph in EXP-263 captures exactly this scoped credit before showing why the dome's specific number-twice match is not a measurement. NUMERICAL DISCREPANCY NOTED: The operator's hnote framed the velocity-correction kernel as "11.78 Hz becomes ≈ 7.83 Hz once Tesla's 471,240 km/s is replaced with c. With cavity-loss correction: ≈ 7.83 Hz." The operator's "with cavity-loss correction" framing doesn't quite work numerically — Tesla's 1D round-trip formula at vacuum c gives 7.48 Hz, not 7.83 Hz, with no further correction available that goes UP from 7.48 to 7.83 (cavity losses lower the lossless cavity value, not raise it). The 7.83 Hz Schumann fundamental comes from a distinct formula (TM-mode spherical-cavity resonance, c·sqrt(2)/(2π R) ≈ 10.6 Hz ideal, lowered ~26% by real cavity losses to 7.83 Hz). The two formulas happen to share c/(2π R) as a leading factor, putting them in the same ballpark. EXP-263 uses the accurate framing: "≈7.48 Hz, within 5% of the modern Schumann fundamental of 7.83 Hz" and explicitly disclaims the result as "the same ballpark" rather than a derivation of Schumann from Tesla. Anticipated_objections #2 documents the discrepancy in case a curmudgeon catches the operator's original phrasing. CURMUDGEON VERIFICATION RECOMMENDATIONS (flagged in EXP-263.curmudgeon_verification_recommended): - Spot-check 6/18/30 Hz Tesla-resonance figures against Tesla Universe's transcription of Colorado Springs Notes (operator cites secondary aggregation; primary-text spot-check appropriate). - Verify Balser & Wagner 1960 first-measurement DOI (10.1029/JZ065i007p02103). - Verify Schumann 1952 DOI (10.1515/zna-1952-0202). - Spot-check the velocity-correction arithmetic: 40,075 km / c = 0.13368 s → 7.48 Hz, 4.7% gap to 7.83 Hz, π/2 vs 1.572 match within 0.07%. - Confirm tone and depth of inserted block matches rest of WIN-001 detail_evidence. DECIDER ROUTING: Two patches both targeted_substring_replacement; both substring anchors verified unique in data/wins.json (count=1 each). Dry-run apply tested in-memory: post-patch JSON.parse succeeds; new "Prediction or measurement?" content present; "

The dome's formula exposes the relabeling." anchor preserved verbatim; new tldr_evidence string installed. Standard win-detail amendment integration path. Per HNOTE routing instruction, recommend curmudgeon target_type=win-detail-rewrite review after integration to verify primary-source citations.
